narrative: Houthi tanker attacks in the Gulf and WTI crude's surge above $92 drive a geopolitical risk premium—USD leads G10 (+0.80%) as GBP/USD slides to 1.3316 on risk-premium demand; gold lower -2.41% at $4,052; equities -1.21%; DXY +0.32%; VIX 18.7. USD/JPY firms to 163.87 as the 263bp SOFR-TONA carry remains the dominant anchor despite rising Gulf War risks. Watch Tokyo CPI tomorrow at 23:30 UTC for any JPY policy-tightening catalysts.
